name: USBC, Inc.
summary: USBC, Inc. (formerly Know Labs, Inc.) is a Nevada corporation that has adopted a tokenized cryptocurrency treasury strategy, with a focus on Bitcoin holdings as a core part of its financial strategy. The company is in a transition period following a fiscal year end change from September 30 to December 31, 2025. Specific legacy products or services are not described in the provided filing excerpt.
